[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101110011 6
1 101011101 6
2 101011111 7
3 111110101 7
4 001100001 3
5 101110011 6
6 001111001 5
7 111111111 a
